title: Design Plan
summary: Create a lightweight design plan for your software idea.
studentInstructions: Describe the main components of the system.
Show how data flows through the system.
List important edge cases or constraints.
Explain one design tradeoff you are making.

rubric.description: Major parts of the system are identified and explained.
The document explains how information moves through the system.
The proposed file/folder structure is reasonable for the project.
The plan recognizes likely failure points or limitations.
At least one design tradeoff is explained thoughtfully.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment specification and rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write clear feedback and deeper notes.
